node.html: An autonomous agent that uses large language models to extract Finite State Machines from 3GPP 5G protocol specifications and generate adversarial test cases for security fuzzing. The agent pipeline includes PDF extraction from specification documents, semantic FSM construction using LLMs, and automated test case generation that targets edge cases in protocol state transitions. Integrates with the srsRAN 5G testbed for real-world execution and validation.

Implementation of graph neural network architectures for weather forecasting, including DeepMind's Functional Generative Network (FGN), GenCast, WindBorne's WeatherMesh-3, Microsoft's Aurora, and FengWu-GHR. The project provides modular components for graph-based weather prediction, enabling experimentation with different GNN architectures on global weather data.

A local MLOps resume optimization tool using Qwen3-8B and LangGraph. The agent pipeline includes a 5-step state machine: gap analysis, content rewriting, LaTeX compilation, error reflection with automatic debugging, and PDF validation. Runs entirely on a single Linux GPU server with 8GB VRAM, keeping all data local and private.

An autonomous AI agent that handles the entire job application process — from finding relevant postings to generating ATS-optimized resumes and cover letters, to automatically submitting applications. Features include smart filtering, company blacklist, iterative learning from user review, and a job tracker. Supports Indeed, ZipRecruiter, Glassdoor, and Dice.

A high-performance local AI agent that triages customer support tickets, validates order details, and drafts policy-compliant responses. Built with LangGraph for stateful conversation management using "Sticky Threads" that bind conversation history to Order IDs. Includes full observability via LangSmith tracing and a Next.js chat UI frontend.

Completed LangChain Academy's comprehensive course covering agent creation, advanced multi-agent systems, and production-ready agent deployment. Includes projects building a Personal Chef agent, Wedding Planner with MCP integration, and an Email Assistant with human-in-the-loop capabilities. Explores Model Context Protocol, context management, and dynamic agent architectures.

Multi-modal sensor fusion project combining YOLOv8 object detection with vehicle telemetry data from the NuScenes autonomous driving dataset. Fuses camera-based object detection with CAN bus telemetry (acceleration, braking) to enrich detection context with driving state information. Includes custom YOLO training on sensor fusion datasets and real-time telemetry extraction pipelines.

Uplift modeling project for the RetailHero competition, ranking customers by the effectiveness of marketing communication. Implements multiple uplift modeling approaches including S-learner, T-learner, and X-learner meta-learners using EconML. Processes customer profiles, purchase history, and campaign response data to identify persuadable customers who are most likely to respond positively to targeted interventions.

Building large language models from the ground up using PyTorch. Implements character-level bigram models, scaled dot-product attention, multi-head attention, and transformer blocks following the GPT architecture. Covers the full pipeline from tokenization to training, including GPU optimization with CUDA, learning rate scheduling, and text generation with temperature sampling.

A full-stack chat application built with TypeScript and LangGraph, featuring research and retrieval agents. The app provides a web-based chat interface for interacting with AI agents that can search the web, retrieve documents, and synthesize information across multiple turns of conversation. Built with a modular agent architecture supporting pluggable tools and multi-agent orchestration.

An open-source coding agent platform with VS Code extension support. Features autonomous code generation, multi-file editing, and job pipeline automation. Includes extensions for resume optimization and job application automation, demonstrating how agent architectures can be applied to practical workflows.
